mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.order_no AS orderNo, a.user_id AS userId, a.doctor_id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, d.avatar AS doctorAvatar, d.title AS doctorTitle, a.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.name AS hospitalName, h.image AS hospitalImage, dt.name AS departmentName, a.patient_name AS patientName, a.patient_phone AS patientPhone, a.patient_id_card AS patientIdCard, a.patient_gender AS patientGender, a.patient_age AS patientAge, a.appointment_date AS appointmentDate, a.appointment_time AS appointmentTime, a.disease_desc AS diseaseDesc, a.amount, a.status, a.pay_time AS payTime, a.create_time AS createTime, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_review r WHERE r.order_type = 1 AND r.order_id = a.id AND r.user_id = a.user_id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReviewed FROM t_appointment a LEFT JOIN t_doctor d ON a.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN t_hospital h ON a.hospital_id = h.id LEFT JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id WHERE a.order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
